name: Fleet BYOV Technician Onboarding
description: Complete BYOV (Bring Your Own Vehicle) onboarding process for fleet technicians

steps.title: Verify BYOV Vehicle Requirements
steps.description: Confirm vehicle meets all BYOV program requirements

substeps.title: Review submitted vehicle photos
substeps.description: Verify front, back, left, right side photos meet quality standards

substeps.title: Verify VIN number documentation
substeps.description: Confirm VIN matches vehicle and is properly documented

substeps.title: Validate insurance coverage
substeps.description: Ensure insurance meets BYOV program minimum requirements

substeps.title: Check vehicle registration status
substeps.description: Verify current registration and compliance with local laws

steps.title: Assign New Van Number
steps.description: Process van number assignment and system setup

substeps.title: Generate new van number
substeps.description: Create unique van number for BYOV vehicle in fleet system

substeps.title: Update fleet management system
substeps.description: Add BYOV vehicle to fleet tracking and management systems

substeps.title: Configure GPS tracking
substeps.description: Set up vehicle tracking for the new BYOV assignment

substeps.title: Process previous vehicle transition
substeps.description: Handle transition from current truck to new BYOV vehicle

steps.title: Complete BYOV Compliance Setup
steps.description: Ensure all compliance and safety requirements are met

substeps.title: Confirm BYOV agreement signed
substeps.description: Verify technician has signed BYOV program agreement

substeps.title: Schedule safety inspection
substeps.description: Arrange for initial BYOV vehicle safety inspection

substeps.title: Update HR and payroll records
substeps.description: Ensure HR systems reflect BYOV program participation

options.label: Vehicle Does Not Meet BYOV Requirements
